global_principles.reduced_motion: Honor prefers-reduced-motion via framer-motion useReducedMotion(): drop translate (y=0) and set duration to 0; keep opacity transitions instant. Marquee should also halt on reduce-motion (animation-play-state: paused).
global_principles.tone_note: Bodhi is a yoga / calm brand — keep motion gentle, slow, and subtle. No bouncing springs, no flashy reveals, no per-element drama.

tailwind_primitives.hover-underline-link: relative transition-colors duration-200 hover:text-brand-primary after:absolute after:left-0 after:-bottom-0.5 after:h-px after:w-0 after:bg-current after:transition-all after:duration-300 hover:after:w-full

css_keyframes.marquee: @keyframes marquee { from { transform: translateX(0); } to { transform: translateX(-50%); } }
css_keyframes.marquee_notes: Define in globals.css if not already present. Duplicate the items list twice inside the track for a seamless loop; translateX(-50%) lands at the start of the duplicate. 45s gives a calm, readable pace.

components.notes: SKIP — reuse-as-is per user instruction. Hero already has its own motion. Do not modify.

motion.notes: Continuous horizontal loop — preserve existing behavior. Duplicate the 8-limb array inline (or render the list twice) inside a flex track; apply animate-[marquee_45s_linear_infinite]. motion-reduce:animate-none pauses for users with reduced-motion preference.

components.notes: Decorative motif only. No hover, no click, no entrance animation — the continuous loop IS the motion. Keep it intact.

motion.notes: Parent variants drive the two columns + inner text blocks. whileInView with once:true.
Image just fades — no translate. Avoids two columns animating in opposing directions.

components.notes: Editorial band — calm, no interactive elements. Pure entrance choreography.

motion.notes: Large lifestyle photo — fade only, no slide. Keeps the heavy visual quiet.
Inner stagger for heading → intro → pillars title → pillar list → CTA.
Each bullet fades up sequentially at 0.08s steps — feels like a list 'settling in'.
Arrow nudges 2px right on hover (apply group/group-hover on the link). Pair with hover-underline-link for the label.

actions.rationale: Decomposition.json props.cta.href='/about' — 'Learn More' CTA → About page.

components.notes: Two-column band. Left image fades quietly; right column does the storytelling stagger.

motion.notes: Eyebrow + title + 'More Courses' link fade up together per rail.
3 cards per rail, stagger 0.08s each. Use whileInView so the second rail animates when its own viewport hits, not when the first does.

components.notes: Dark full-bleed band. Two stacked rails — each rail animates independently when it enters the viewport.

motion.notes: Cards sit on the dark band — use the darker shadow variant so the lift reads. Subtle 2px lift, soft shadow.
Image scales gently to 1.03 on hover within the card root. overflow-hidden on wrapper. Pairs with card lift for a single felt interaction.
Use group/group-hover on the card so the inner arrow shifts when hovering anywhere on the card, not just the link.

actions.rationale: Each card receives cta.href via props. Decomposition.json currently passes '#' for all 6 cards — see unresolved.
actions.conditional: Render as <Link> when href is non-empty/non-'#'; otherwise still wire but flagged as placeholder.

components.notes: Reusable card component. Local interaction = hover lift + soft image zoom + arrow nudge. Entrance is parent-driven.

motion.notes: The whole rounded card fades up as one block.
Inner stagger so logos appear sequentially once the card lands. 0.06s step (faster than default — many small items).
Each logo just fades — no translate. Logos in motion feel cheap; fades feel quiet/respectful.

components.notes: Trust band. No interactivity (logos are non-clickable per Figma). Entrance is the whole motion budget.

motion.notes: 3 cards stagger in at 0.1s steps — slightly slower than default to let each quote land.

components.notes: Cards are non-clickable. No hover state — testimonials should feel still, not interactive.
Static once revealed. No hover, no click. Per testimonials convention, do not add hover-lift.

actions.rationale: Decomposition.json props.cta.href='/contact' — 'Try a class, free' CTA → contact form.

components.notes: Centered closing band on the dark surface. Stagger feels like one calm exhale.

motion.notes: All footer column links get the subtle hover-underline + color shift. No entrance animation on the footer itself (it's at the bottom of the page and should just be there when reached).

actions.rationale: Decomposition: Teacher Training → /teacher-courses, Workshops → /workshops, Classes → /yoga-courses, Faculty → /our-trainers, Lineage → /about. All known.
Decomposition has 'Get directions' href='#'. Likely should be a Google Maps URL — see unresolved.
Decomposition has href='#'. Needs a real signup URL or modal trigger — see unresolved.
Decomposition has href='#'. Needs the Bodhi Instagram URL — see unresolved.
Decomposition has href='#'. Needs the Bodhi YouTube URL — see unresolved.

components.notes: Footer should not animate on entrance — by the time the user has scrolled here the page should feel settled. Only hover states.

shared_parent_variants.reduced_motion_note: Wrap with useReducedMotion(); if true, set child.hidden.y = 0 and child.visible.transition.duration = 0.

implementation_hints.reuse_RevealOnScroll: Prefer apps/web/src/components/ui/reveal-on-scroll.tsx where it already exists — it encodes the house easing + reduced-motion fallback. Use it for single-block fades (e.g. FounderQuote portrait, AccreditationsSection.logo_card).
implementation_hints.marquee_css: Add @keyframes marquee { from { transform: translateX(0); } to { transform: translateX(-50%); } } to apps/web/src/app/globals.css if missing. Render the items array twice inside the track.
implementation_hints.group_hover_pattern: For card-wide hover states that move inner elements (e.g. ProgramCard arrow nudge), apply 'group' to the card root and 'group-hover:' on the inner element. Tailwind handles the rest.
implementation_hints.dark_surface_cards: ProgramCard sits on the dark band — use hover-lift-card-dark (heavier shadow) not the light variant. The shadow must show against dark.

unresolved.reason: All 6 ProgramCard cta.href values in decomposition.json are '#'. Each program needs a real route (e.g. /teacher-courses/300-hour-ytt-online, /yoga-courses/pranayama-nervous-system, /yoga-courses/face-yoga-teacher-training). The corresponding slug pages exist under apps/web/src/app/yoga-courses/ and apps/web/src/app/teacher-courses/ — orchestrator should ask user for the 6 hrefs or wire them by best-match slug.
unresolved.guess: Render <Link> but pass through href='#' until resolved — visible visually, navigation TBD.

unresolved.reason: Decomposition has href='#'. Likely a Google Maps URL for the studio. User needs to provide the address pin URL.
Decomposition has href='#'. Could be a /newsletter page, a mailchimp form, or a modal — needs product decision.
